project.name: gpgpu-kb
project.summary: Self-updating GPGPU chip-architecture research knowledge base. Daily ingest of ArXiv / curated RSS (12) / sitemap-driven blog scraper / GitHub trending; per-source-type LLM scoring on universal axes (quality, relevance) using full-text body when available (PDF / HTML via trafilatura / GitHub README via REST API; cap 30K chars in scoring prompt, 200K chars in cache); ChromaDB-backed semantic search and multi-turn / source-anchored RAG chat with on-demand full-text loading and SSE streaming token output via Fast/Expert dual-role LLM (call_llm/stream_llm with role parameter); chat prompt source-text cap raised to 200K to match the cache cap; manual web-trigger of the daily pipeline with SSE-streamed progress (POST /api/daily/stream); ingestion tail step prefetches non-paper full_text in 4-worker concurrency; bilingual (en/zh) Markdown daily reports; per-source-name ingest cold-start; Dockerized deployment with optional cron pipeline; aggregate `[all]` extras + Docker default INSTALL_EXTRAS=all; themed i18n frontend shell (Cream Linen / Walnut Hearth oklch dual-theme + en/zh i18n via LocaleProvider/ThemeProvider with FOUC-prevention inline script).
stack: Threading + bounded Queue (in-process daily pipeline runner)
ThreadPoolExecutor (4 workers for fulltext prefetch / backfill)

api_routes: GET /api/papers (sort_by adds quality_score|relevance_score|total_score; default total_score; include_low_quality flag; source_name CSV multi-filter)
GET /api/sources (browse-page tag filter source; group by (source_name, source_type) where is_processed=1, count desc)
GET /api/papers/search (semantic with keyword fallback; LIKE wildcards escaped)

POST /api/chat (Bearer guard via verify_chat_token; supports paper_id (source-anchored) + history[]; uses expert role LLM; shares _build_chat_context with /api/chat/stream; _SOURCE_TEXT_PROMPT_CAP=200_000)
POST /api/chat/stream (Bearer guard; SSE text/event-stream; events: sources -> token... -> done [+ optional error]; uses expert role LLM)
GET /api/daily/status (Bearer guard; returns _DailyRunState snapshot {running, started_at, current_stage} for cross-tab in-flight detection)

POST /api/daily/stream (Bearer guard; SSE text/event-stream; events: started -> stage(<=4) -> log(N) -> done|error; 15s idle keepalive ': keepalive' SSE comment frame; HTTP 409 if another run is in-flight; runs run_daily_pipeline() in a daemon thread without subprocess via _DailyRunState singleton + threading.Lock + bounded Queue(maxsize=2000); _STAGE_PATTERN=r'\[([1-4])/4\]' matches both English and Chinese banners)
GET /api/stats (adds top_overall: cross-source-type top-5 by max(quality, relevance))
data_models: Paper (papers): includes universal score axes quality_score / relevance_score / score_rationale alongside legacy originality_score / impact_score / impact_rationale; full_text TEXT column lazily populated by source-anchored chat AND proactively by ingestion tail prefetch_pending_full_text() (PDF / HTML / GitHub README extraction; cap 200_000 chars)
modules.config: backend/kb/config.py (Pydantic Settings, KB_* env, .env). Fields: language, ingest_empty_db_days, ingest_gap_min_days, ingest_gap_max_days, deepseek_*, chat_token, quality_score_threshold, data_dir, llm_timeout_seconds, llm_provider, llm_expert_provider, llm_expert_model, anthropic_model, openai_model, deepseek_model, github_token, etc.
modules.dependencies: backend/pyproject.toml (extras: ml, llm-cloud, fulltext (trafilatura>=1.12.0), all (aggregate of ml+llm-cloud+fulltext), dev). Default deps include pypdf>=5.0. Docker controls extras via ARG INSTALL_EXTRAS=all (default; aggregate). Pre-download SentenceTransformer triggered when extras matches 'ml' OR 'all' (regex grep -qE ',(ml|all),').
modules.tests: backend/tests/ (~242 tests; renamed test_processing_pdf.py -> test_processing_fulltext.py with 17 cases covering PDF preserved + HTML happy/oversize stream abort + GitHub happy/404/non-github URL/.git suffix stripping + prefetch row selection + idempotence; test_ingestion_run.py adds patch.object(fulltext_mod, 'prefetch_pending_full_text', return_value=0) so the spy doesn't trigger real network)
llm_providers: hermes (local CLI; not available in Docker; cannot truly stream)

llm_role_overlay.public_api: call_llm(prompt, role='fast'|'expert') -> str; stream_llm(prompt, role='fast'|'expert') -> Iterator[str]; both default to role='fast' for back-compat with non-role callers.
llm_role_overlay._resolve_role: _resolve_role(role) -> (provider_name, model_override): role='expert' -> (settings.llm_expert_provider or settings.llm_provider, settings.llm_expert_model); else -> (settings.llm_provider, None).
llm_role_overlay.provider_signature: All _call_* / _stream_* providers accept (prompt, *, model: str | None = None). model=None falls back to settings.<provider>_model; non-None overrides. Hermes accepts but ignores model (CLI has no --model flag).
llm_role_overlay.transparency: If KB_LLM_EXPERT_PROVIDER and KB_LLM_EXPERT_MODEL are both unset, expert role transparently delegates to fast role — zero behavioral change vs pre-2026-05-03 21:41:00 deployments.

loaders.pdf: _download_pdf via httpx.Client.stream + early abort at _MAX_PDF_BYTES=20MB; pypdf PdfReader for text extraction. Triggered when _looks_like_pdf_url(paper.pdf_url or paper.url).
loaders.html: _fetch_html_article via httpx.Client.stream + early abort at _MAX_HTML_BYTES=8MB; trafilatura.extract for boilerplate-stripped article body. Requires [fulltext] extras; without it logger.error + return ''.
loaders.github: _fetch_github_readme via REST api.github.com/repos/{owner}/{repo}/readme + Accept: application/vnd.github.raw; auto-strips trailing '.git' clone-URL suffix; _MAX_README_BYTES=4MB oversize -> return '' (NOT byte-truncate); _GITHUB_REPO_RE matches github.com/owner/repo; settings.github_token forwarded if set.

fulltext_module_2026_05_05.dispatcher: _extract_for_paper(paper) cascades: PDF first, then GitHub if source_type=PROJECT and 'github.com/' in url, else HTML, else ''. fetch_full_text(paper_id) is the public API used by /api/chat[/stream]; honors cache via paper.full_text non-empty short-circuit; persists on success; abstract_fallback (summary + abstract) on transient failure WITHOUT writing.
fulltext_module_2026_05_05.cache: Paper.full_text TEXT column. _MAX_EXTRACTED_CHARS=200_000 char cap (raised from 120K to match the new chat prompt cap _SOURCE_TEXT_PROMPT_CAP=200K).
fulltext_module_2026_05_05.prefetch_tail: prefetch_pending_full_text(batch_size=None) called as tail of run_ingestion(); 4-worker ThreadPoolExecutor (_PREFETCH_WORKERS=4); filters source_type IN (BLOG, PROJECT, TALK) AND full_text='' (idempotent); wrapped in try/except in kb/ingestion/run.py so a failure cannot poison ingest counts; results['fulltext_prefetched']=N reported in the dict.
fulltext_module_2026_05_05.ensure_cached_helper: _ensure_cached(paper_id) -> bool — single SessionLocal worker thunk used by prefetch (and backfill_full_text.py); skips already-cached rows, runs _extract_for_paper, persists on success, returns True if cache populated. Conservative concurrency vs the 8-worker processing stage because we hit N origin servers vs one cloud LLM.
fulltext_module_2026_05_05.scoring_uses_fulltext: kb/processing/llm.py::summarize_and_score uses paper.full_text or paper.abstract; _SCORING_BODY_CAP=30_000 char cap (token budget; rubric + system msg leaves ~7K tokens for body); prompt field renamed Abstract: -> Content:.
fulltext_module_2026_05_05.chat_prompt_cap_raised: kb/main.py::_SOURCE_TEXT_PROMPT_CAP raised 60K -> 200_000 to match _MAX_EXTRACTED_CHARS so a fully-cached article is not double-truncated; convention: _SOURCE_TEXT_PROMPT_CAP <= _MAX_EXTRACTED_CHARS.
fulltext_module_2026_05_05.extras_aggregate: [fulltext] = ['trafilatura>=1.12.0']; [all] = ['gpgpu-kb[ml]', 'gpgpu-kb[llm-cloud]', 'gpgpu-kb[fulltext]'] (self-referential aggregate; pip>=23 / setuptools support). Docker default ARG INSTALL_EXTRAS=all (was 'ml,llm-cloud').
operational_scripts: kb/scripts/backfill_full_text.py — one-shot backfill for legacy non-paper rows; --dry-run / --limit / --source-type; 4-worker concurrency; reuses _ensure_cached; targets is_processed IN (1,2) AND full_text=''; does NOT re-score (cheaper HTTP fetch decoupled from LLM tokens; pair with rescore_non_papers --include-already-scored as a second step).
kb/scripts/rescore_non_papers.py — adds --include-already-scored flag dropping the quality_score==0.0 filter so operators can re-evaluate after backfill.

daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.purpose: Replicate `python -m kb.daily` execution via HTTP without spawning a subprocess; let frontend /reports page Run-Now button fire it and stream live progress.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.auth: Both endpoints use dependencies=[Depends(verify_chat_token)] — Bearer-token-guarded same as /api/chat[/stream] when KB_CHAT_TOKEN is set.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.concurrency_model: _DailyRunState singleton holds threading.Lock + _running flag + Queue(maxsize=2000). try_start() atomically claims the slot; second concurrent POST gets HTTPException(409, 'A daily pipeline run is already in progress.'). end() in worker finally releases the lock.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.execution_model: _run_daily_in_worker(queue) runs in a daemon thread. Inside the function body it does `from kb.daily import run_daily_pipeline` (lazy import) so test monkeypatch.setattr(daily_mod, 'run_daily_pipeline', ...) is hit when the worker starts. NO SUBPROCESS — daemon thread directly occupies the main backend process's compute.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.log_capture: _QueueLogHandler is added to root logger so logging.* lines are pumped into the queue. _QueueStdoutWriter via contextlib.redirect_stdout captures the pipeline's banner print() lines (kb/daily.py prints '[N/4] <stage>' headers, not log calls). Both routes feed the same queue; the SSE generator does not distinguish source.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.termination_invariant: finally block ALWAYS does queue.put_nowait(('__terminator__', None)). The SSE generator breaks on this sentinel; without it the generator hangs forever on queue.get(timeout=15).
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.stage_detection: _STAGE_PATTERN = re.compile(r'\[([1-4])/4\]'); _STAGE_NAMES = {1:'ingestion',2:'processing',3:'embedding',4:'report'}. kb/daily.py prints the [N/4] prefix regardless of KB_LANGUAGE (only the stage NAME after the prefix is translated), so both 'INGESTION' and '数据采集' banners work; this is hard contract between kb/daily.py banners and main.py _STAGE_PATTERN.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.stage_dedup: last_stage_emitted tracks the last index emitted; banner reprints don't double-fire stage frames.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.event_sequence: started (exactly 1; payload {started_at}) -> stage (<=4; payload {index, name}) -> log (N; payload {line}) -> done (exactly 1 OR error if exception; mutually exclusive). 15s idle in queue.get -> yield ': keepalive\n\n' SSE comment frame; frontend _parseDailyFrame must skip lines starting with ':'.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.headers: X-Accel-Buffering: no + Cache-Control: no-cache (defeats nginx/cpolar buffering for text/event-stream).
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.no_reattach_design: There is intentionally no 'reattach to running stream' mechanism — SSE stream ownership belongs to the originating POST connection. Other tabs / clients trying to POST again get 409; they should poll /api/daily/status for {running, current_stage} to render 'in-flight' UI but cannot consume the live stream.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.behavior_when_browser_closes: Daemon thread is unaffected by client disconnect; pipeline runs to completion -> writes DB -> releases _DailyRunState lock. Next /reports page load hits /api/daily/status which shows idle, with new data already in the DB. Only backend process exit interrupts the pipeline.

auth.chat_endpoint: Optional Bearer token via KB_CHAT_TOKEN; compared via hmac.compare_digest in verify_chat_token (Depends).
auth.daily_endpoints_same_guard: /api/daily/status AND /api/daily/stream both use dependencies=[Depends(verify_chat_token)]; reuse the same Bearer token guard. Any new 'expensive / writing / job-triggering' endpoint MUST reuse this dependency — convention going forward.

scoring.quality_gate: max(quality, relevance) >= KB_QUALITY_SCORE_THRESHOLD (default 7.0). Applied ONLY to source_type=paper.
scoring.paper_legacy_mirror: For papers, summarize_and_score copies quality->originality_score, relevance->impact_score, score_rationale->impact_rationale.
scoring.body_for_scoring: summarize_and_score now uses paper.full_text or paper.abstract (cap _SCORING_BODY_CAP=30_000 chars) — meaningful improvement on blog / project rubric quality vs the legacy 200-char og:description / GitHub trending blurb.

ingestion.per_source_cold_start: _lookback_for_source(source_name) per fetcher: empty source_name -> KB_INGEST_EMPTY_DB_DAYS (default 30); existing -> now - max(ingested_date) clamped to [KB_INGEST_GAP_MIN_DAYS, KB_INGEST_GAP_MAX_DAYS]. 4 fetchers (arxiv / rss / sitemap_blog / github) all support days_back: int | None signature.
ingestion.tail_step_prefetch: run_ingestion() ends with try/except wrapping `prefetch_pending_full_text()` from kb.processing.fulltext; populates results['fulltext_prefetched']; failure does NOT poison the ingest counts above. Idempotent — already-cached rows are skipped on every subsequent call.

modules.cold_start_handling: kb.daily detects whether any paper has is_processed != 0 (processing) and whether any is_processed=1 row has chroma_id != '' (embedding). If neither, run_processing / index_unindexed_papers run with batch_size=None to drain the entire backlog. Steady-state runs cap at 100/run.

chinese_mode.scope: summarize prompt suffix, score_rationale value (JSON keys stay English), daily report content + title + section names. CLI override: python -m kb.daily --lang zh.
chinese_mode.chat_prompt_now_hardcoded_chinese: AS OF 2026-05-02 21:18:53: /api/chat and /api/chat/stream system prompts are HARDCODED to Chinese in _build_chat_context — KB_LANGUAGE no longer affects them.
chinese_mode.frontend_locale_independent: Frontend UI language (en/zh) is controlled separately via gpgpu-kb.locale.v1 in browser localStorage — independent of backend KB_LANGUAGE. Chat outputs are always Chinese; Browse / Reports / Stats UI strings follow the user's localStorage choice.

docker.dockerfile: backend/Dockerfile (python:3.12-slim, ARG INSTALL_EXTRAS=all default (aggregate ml+llm-cloud+fulltext), VOLUME /app/data, HEALTHCHECK /api/health, CMD uvicorn ... --timeout-keep-alive 75)
docker.build_args_default: INSTALL_EXTRAS: ${BACKEND_INSTALL_EXTRAS:-all} — falls back to aggregate even when .env is missing. ST model is pre-downloaded when grep -qE ',(ml|all),' matches.
docker.daily_profile: docker compose --profile cron run --rm daily (one-shot pipeline reusing backend image; isolated container vs the in-process /api/daily/stream daemon thread)

modules.api_client: frontend/src/lib/api.ts (API_BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL ?? ''). chat() forwards optional paper_id and history. chatStream(request, {signal?}) async generator for /api/chat/stream. getDailyStatus() (GET /api/daily/status) + runDailyStream({signal?}) async generator (POST /api/daily/stream, body '{}', Accept: text/event-stream) + DailyConflictError class (HTTP 409) + _parseDailyFrame (CRITICAL: skips lines starting with ':' to drop SSE keepalive comment frames + skips empty lines). _chatPayload(request) shared by chat() and chatStream(). _parseSSEFrame joins consecutive 'data:' lines with '\n' per SSE spec.
modules.types: frontend/src/lib/types.ts (mirrors backend kb/schemas.py + kb/main.py::_sse_event). Adds quality_score / relevance_score / score_rationale, Stats.top_overall?, ChatMessage{role:user|assistant,content}, ChatRequest.paper_id? / history?, ChatStreamEvent discriminated union, Source{name,type,count} / SourcesResponse, DailyStatus{running, started_at, current_stage} / DailyStageName='ingestion'|'processing'|'embedding'|'report' / DailyStreamEvent discriminated union (started|stage|log|error|done; stage payload {index:1|2|3|4, name:DailyStageName}).

读取 frontend/eslint.config.* / tsconfig.json / postcss.config.* 以记录构建/类型/lint 约定
深扫 backend/tests/conftest.py 验证 _init_db / client 夹具如何隔离 SQLite 与 ChromaDB
扫 backend/kb/ingestion/arxiv.py 与 github_trending.py 源码以核实 cs.* 类目列表与 polite-sleep 触发条件
为 docs/ 目录补充实际内容或在根 CLAUDE.md 中标注其用途
评估把 chat 系统 prompt 也接到 KB_LANGUAGE 或前端 locale，或加新变量 KB_CHAT_LANGUAGE 独立控制
考虑 SSE 端点真正发 'error' 事件而非静默吞掉 stream_llm 异常（chat 路径）
考虑给 daily pipeline SSE 端点加 'reattach' 机制（SSE Last-Event-ID 或单独的 status-broadcast endpoint），让多 tab / 多用户可同时观察一次 in-flight run
评估在 frontend/src/lib/i18n/ 下加自动校验脚本（预 commit hook：translations.zh 必须含 translations.en 的所有 key）
更新 backend/tests/README.md 的测试计数（当前显示 ~75，实际 ~242）

changelog.summary: Created root CLAUDE.md, backend/CLAUDE.md, frontend/CLAUDE.md, and .claude/index.json

Synced docs with code deltas: deepseek LLM provider, /api/chat Bearer Token guard via verify_chat_token + hmac.compare_digest (KB_CHAT_TOKEN), .github/workflows/ci.yml (3-job CI), Playwright e2e suite, backend/tests/README.md.
Documented KB_QUALITY_SCORE_THRESHOLD (default 7.0), is_processed buckets 0/1/2, /api/papers default-hides low quality, /api/stats split into processed/skipped_low_quality/pending.

Universal Score Axes (paper/blog/talk/project rubrics + paper legacy mirroring), Chinese-language LLM mode (KB_LANGUAGE), Docker Compose deployment stack (backend/frontend Dockerfiles + .dockerignore + docker-compose.yml + .env.docker.example), Next.js standalone build with /api/* reverse proxy (eliminates CORS), adaptive ingestion lookback window (KB_INGEST_*), cold-start uncapped processing/embedding, one-shot rescore_non_papers.py operations script, RSS feed pruning (AnandTech / Meta AI Blog removed), PaperOut.categories field_validator for legacy dict tags.

Multi-turn + source-anchored chat refresh: ChatMessage / ChatRequest schema additions; _format_history (12 turn cap); paper_id branch with fetch_full_text; NEW kb/processing/pdf.py; Paper.full_text TEXT column; pypdf>=5.0 default dep; --timeout-keep-alive 75 fix; frontend chat refactor with two-pane layout, useConversationHistory hook (localStorage gpgpu-kb.chat.conversations.v1), ChatRightSidebar with Tabs (History|Source), SourcePicker dialog, /chat?paperId= deep-link auto-pin; mobile responsive; new tests test_processing_pdf.py + 5 chat-mode cases. Suite ~95 -> ~105.

SSE streaming chat: NEW POST /api/chat/stream + shared _build_chat_context + stream_llm abstraction + chat system prompt hardcoded Chinese + frontend chatStream async generator + Stop button. Suite ~105 -> ~115.
vLLM Blog (RSS) + LMSYS / SGLang Blog (sitemap-driven via NEW kb/ingestion/sitemap_blog.py); pytest 174/174 pass.
Per-Paper.source_name ingest cold-start: _lookback_for_source(source_name) + 4 fetchers unified to days_back: int | None signature. Tests 174 -> 180 pass.

Fast / Expert dual-role LLM: Settings.llm_expert_provider / llm_expert_model + _resolve_role + (prompt, *, model: str | None = None) provider signature + call_llm/stream_llm role kwarg + /api/chat[/stream] uses expert. Tests 180 -> 203 pass.

Themed i18n frontend shell + manual daily-pipeline trigger endpoints (SSE progress). Frontend: NEW lib/i18n + lib/theme modules; Cream Linen / Walnut Hearth oklch dual themes in globals.css; FOUC-prevention inline script in layout.tsx; Header adds ThemeSwitcher + LanguageSwitcher; Sidebar i18n'd. Backend: NEW POST /api/daily/stream + GET /api/daily/status with Bearer guard + _DailyRunState singleton + _QueueLogHandler + _QueueStdoutWriter + _STAGE_PATTERN. Reports page rewritten with Run-Now button + RunPhase state machine + 4-stage StagePill + log panel + cross-tab in-flight detection. NEW _drain_daily_sse helper + 6 SSE cases.

Browse 页 Source 名称多选过滤. Backend: NEW GET /api/sources + GET /api/papers?source_name= multi-filter. Frontend: NEW source-filter.tsx component + URL state via window.history.replaceState (workaround for Next 16.2.x router cache regression vercel/next.js#92187). Tests 209 -> 216 pass + 2 e2e cases.

Universal full-text loader (HTML / GitHub README / PDF) + scoring on full body + chat prompt cap raised to 200K + aggregate [all] extras. Backend: kb/processing/pdf.py renamed to kb/processing/fulltext.py with 3 loaders dispatched on source/url (PDF preserved + HTML via trafilatura + GitHub via REST API auto-stripping .git suffix); all three use httpx stream + early abort (PDF 20MB / HTML 8MB / README 4MB; oversize uniformly returns '' to keep cache untainted). Paper.full_text cap 120K -> 200_000 chars. NEW _ensure_cached(paper_id) single-SessionLocal worker for prefetch. run_ingestion() now ends with try/except calling prefetch_pending_full_text() (4-worker ThreadPoolExecutor; filters source_type IN (BLOG, PROJECT, TALK) AND full_text=''; idempotent; results['fulltext_prefetched'] reported; failures don't poison ingest counts). summarize_and_score now uses paper.full_text or paper.abstract with _SCORING_BODY_CAP=30_000; prompt field renamed Abstract: -> Content:. _SOURCE_TEXT_PROMPT_CAP raised 60K -> 200_000 to match cache cap. NEW [fulltext]=['trafilatura>=1.12.0'] extras + aggregate [all]=['gpgpu-kb[ml]','gpgpu-kb[llm-cloud]','gpgpu-kb[fulltext]'] (self-referential, pip>=23 / setuptools support). Docker default ARG INSTALL_EXTRAS=all (was 'ml,llm-cloud') + ST predownload condition grep -qE ',(ml|all),' compatible with new default + docker-compose.yml ${BACKEND_INSTALL_EXTRAS:-all} fallback + .env.docker.example BACKEND_INSTALL_EXTRAS=all default. NEW kb/scripts/backfill_full_text.py (--dry-run / --limit / --source-type + 4-worker pool + reuses _ensure_cached + targets is_processed IN (1,2) AND full_text=''; does NOT re-score). rescore_non_papers.py adds --include-already-scored flag. Tests 216 -> 242: rename test_processing_pdf.py -> test_processing_fulltext.py expanded to 17 cases (PDF preserved + HTML happy/network-fail/oversize stream-abort + GitHub happy/404/non-github URL/.git stripping + prefetch row selection + idempotence); test_ingestion_run.py adds patch.object(fulltext_mod, 'prefetch_pending_full_text', return_value=0). NO impact on: DB schema / migration / chat multi-turn / source-anchored chat behavior / SSE streaming chat / fast-expert dual role / per-source ingest cold-start / sitemap blog / /api/daily/* / any frontend code.

DOCS-ONLY RE-SYNC, NO CODE DRIFT. Adaptive scan verified all 2026-05-05 23:15:12 changelog claims by direct source read: (a) backend/kb/processing/fulltext.py — exists with 3 loaders + _ensure_cached + prefetch_pending_full_text + 200K cap + 4-worker pool + httpx stream + early abort caps (8MB HTML / 20MB PDF / 4MB README); (b) backend/kb/scripts/backfill_full_text.py — exists with --dry-run/--limit/--source-type + _ensure_cached reuse + _BACKFILL_WORKERS=4 + is_processed.in_([1,2]) filter; (c) backend/Dockerfile — ARG INSTALL_EXTRAS=all default + grep -qE ',(ml|all),' ST predownload condition + --timeout-keep-alive 75 CMD; (d) backend/pyproject.toml — [fulltext]=['trafilatura>=1.12.0'] + aggregate [all]=['gpgpu-kb[ml]','gpgpu-kb[llm-cloud]','gpgpu-kb[fulltext]']; (e) docker-compose.yml — build.args.INSTALL_EXTRAS: ${BACKEND_INSTALL_EXTRAS:-all} fallback; (f) .env.docker.example — BACKEND_INSTALL_EXTRAS=all default + slim-down notes; (g) backend/kb/ingestion/run.py — run_ingestion() ends with try/except calling prefetch_pending_full_text() and storing results['fulltext_prefetched']; (h) backend/kb/main.py top imports include asyncio/contextlib/hmac/re/threading/deque. All checks pass. Frontend NOT touched this run — root CLAUDE.md narrative + backend changelog entries explicitly mark 'frontend code unchanged' in 2026-05-05 23:15:12. Updates applied: only the top-of-file timestamp banner in CLAUDE.md / backend/CLAUDE.md / frontend/CLAUDE.md, a single new changelog row in each, this index.json's generated_at + scanned_files indicators + this changelog entry. Mermaid graph in root CLAUDE.md got minor wording updates (B3/B4/B6/B8 nodes now mention prefetch tail / fulltext (PDF/HTML/GitHub) / backfill_full_text / INSTALL_EXTRAS=all default to match the now-aligned code). Coverage indicators bumped: files_read_this_run=14, scanned_files counts updated to reflect actual reads. NO new modules identified; backend + frontend remain the two top-level claude_md-bearing modules. Next-steps list pruned of resolved items (fulltext loader / [all] extras / Docker default / backfill script / chat prompt 200K / ingestion tail prefetch — all completed in 2026-05-05 23:15:12) and added one new low-priority item (update backend/tests/README.md test count from ~75 to ~242). All deltas described here are documentation only — no .py / .ts / .tsx / .css / .yml / .toml / .md (except CLAUDE.md trio) source files were modified.
